title: pseudognaphalium viravira
intro: Pseudognaphalium viravira, also known as Chilean everlasting, is a flowering plant native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Pseudognaphalium viravira can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
